mechanism_narrative: The federal funds rate at 0.09% is near zero, signaling an extended monetary accommodation regime. Sustained low rates compress long-term discount rates and reduce term premiums, causing 10-year Treasury yields to decline as investors seek duration. This mechanism operates continuously in low-rate environments.
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield rises in more than 55% of 20-day forward windows when FEDFUNDS remains below 0.5%, or Rank IC falls below 0.02 over any 2-year rolling period.

mechanism_narrative: Unemployment rate at 6.1% signals labor market slack. When UNRATE exceeds 5.5%, wage growth remains subdued, inflation expectations decline, and the Fed maintains accommodative policy, pushing 10-year Treasury yields lower as real rate expectations compress.
regime_hint: labor market slack with subdued wage pressure
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield rises in more than 50% of triggered instances over a 3-year walk-forward window, or correlation between UNRATE changes and yield changes becomes positive (r > 0.1) in any 12-month period.

mechanism_narrative: Retail sales at 444,377 million dollars combined with housing starts at 1,093 thousand units indicate moderate consumer demand. When both RSAFS and HOUST remain below their 12-month moving averages simultaneously, demand weakness signals lower future inflation and economic growth, causing 10-year yields to fall.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS and HOUST both below respective 12-month moving averages
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield falls in fewer than 45% of triggered instances, or the joint signal (both series below MA) produces Rank IC below 0.04 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production at 104.1152 (2017=100) reflects supply-side capacity utilization. When INDPRO growth decelerates below 0.5% month-over-month, it signals supply constraints easing and inflation pressures moderating, causing 10-year Treasury yields to decline as inflation expectations reset lower.
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield rises in more than 52% of triggered instances, or Spearman rank correlation between INDPRO growth rate and 20-day forward yield changes falls below 0.05 in absolute value over any 18-month window.

mechanism_narrative: CPI at 237.909 (1982-1984=100) reflects cumulative price levels. When month-over-month CPI growth exceeds 0.4%, inflation expectations rise, the Fed signals tightening intent, and 10-year Treasury yields rise as investors demand higher compensation for inflation risk and expect future rate hikes.
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield falls in more than 50% of triggered instances, or Rank IC between CPI momentum and 20-day forward yield changes remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll employment at 139,118 thousand persons combined with unemployment at 6.1% indicates labor market tightness. When PAYEMS growth accelerates above 0.3% month-over-month while UNRATE falls below 5.5%, wage pressure builds, inflation expectations rise, and 10-year Treasury yields increase as the Fed signals tightening.
regime_hint: tight labor market with wage acceleration
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield falls in more than 55% of triggered instances, or the joint signal produces Rank IC below 0.05 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP at 15,994.3 billion chained 2017 dollars reflects aggregate demand. When quarterly GDPC1 growth decelerates below 0.5% annualized, it signals late-cycle slowdown, the Fed pauses tightening, and 10-year Treasury yields decline as growth expectations reset lower and rate-hike expectations diminish.
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield rises in more than 50% of triggered instances over a 3-year walk-forward window, or Rank IC between GDPC1 growth and 60-day forward yield changes falls below 0.04 in any 2-year rolling period.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production, CPI, and payroll employment jointly signal supply-demand balance. When INDPRO growth falls below 0.3% month-over-month while CPIAUCSL month-over-month growth exceeds 0.3%, supply constraints persist despite demand weakness, creating stagflationary pressure that raises 10-year Treasury yields as real yields compress and inflation risk premiums expand.
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield falls in more than 52% of triggered instances, or the joint signal produces Rank IC below 0.06 over any 2-year rolling window.
